2024-25 Pepperdine Waves Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 13-22 (4-14, 9th in WCC MBB)

Coach: Ed Schilling

PS/G: 73.1 (199th of 364)

PA/G: 76.6 (308th of 364)

SRS: -2.82 (187th of 364)

SOS: 2.56 (99th of 364)

ORtg: 105.3 (221st of 364)

DRtg: 110.2 (314th of 364)
